title: あたしがなンとかするでがんす！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While out shopping, I come across a pop-up
market for products from Morioka. I'm taking a
cursory look around, when...

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
Welcome t'the Trav'lin Morioka Fest'val! Come
take a look!

text_block_list.name: Shop Owner
text_block_list.text:
S'right! We're here t'introduce Morioka's
traditions 'n' fest'vities. You could call this shop
Moriokan "pee ar"!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
Speaking of Moriokan fest'vals, don't forget 'bout
the sansa odori!
Sakkora! ♪ Choiw—

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Thud!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: Oof! S-s-s-so sorry! I didn't s—

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
Oh, you're a train'r from Tracen, aren't you!
Terribly sorry for bump'n into you!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
I-it is! It's called the sansa odori. It's a tradition'l
dance acc'mpanied by taiko drums.

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
It's easy to learn, so folks of all ages dance it all
th'time at school field days 'n' local events 'n'
such.

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
People even dance down th'street during festivals
like a p'rade. There's even a contest every year
t'see who boogies it th'best!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
There's plenty of other chain dances and such as
well that anyone can join! It's more fun than a
barr'l of monkeys!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
Just talking about it really takes me back...
Ev'ryone's hearts united as one...
choice_data_list: You must really love sansa odori.
You must really love sansa odori.

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe... You can say that again! I love it like
peanut butt'r loves jelly!

text_block_list.name: Shop Owner
text_block_list.text:
Hahaha, you haven't changed a whit... Thinking
that, I can't help but feel bad...

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: What's wrong?

text_block_list.name: Shop Owner
text_block_list.text:
Well... Take a look around. At the rate business is
goin' t'day, I might hafta throw in the towel...

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
N-now that you mention it, there haven't been
any custom'rs.

text_block_list.name: Shop Owner
text_block_list.text:
Guess we got noth'ng that stands out t'these big
city folk. And I wanted to bring good news back
to all th'folks back home who helped with th'prep
and what have ya...

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
What a cryin' shame! There's so much good stuff
here! If they'd only just take a look...

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I know! Let me try talk'n to people! I'll draw in
custom'rs somehow!

text_block_list.name: Shop Owner
text_block_list.text: Yukino...

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: Ev'ryone's worked so hard, I wanna help out too!

text_block_list.name: Shop Owner
text_block_list.text:
...Thank you kindly. You've always been such a
peach. I don't want you to push yourself too hard.

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: Er... Hmm...

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: I-I'm fine, thanks! I'm not givin' up.

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: There's gotta be a good way. Hm... Hmmmmm...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Yukino Bijin racks her brain for ideas all the way
back to her dorm.
